title: Boundary
summary: Defines componentwise equality of multilinear inputs on the boundary and proves its equivalence-relation laws.

mathematicalContent.heading: Mathematical role
mathematicalContent.body: Defines componentwise equality of multilinear inputs on the boundary and proves its equivalence-relation laws.

mathematicalContent.heading: How to read the translation
mathematicalContent.body: The correspondence below follows PolyGJMSoperators/Boundary.lean declaration by declaration. A definition is translated by its defining expression, a theorem by its quantified proposition, and a structure, class, or inductive type by the mathematical data encoded in its fields or constructors. The original Lean signature remains visible beside every translation.

correspondence.mathematicalMeaning: Pointwise boundary equivalence for rank-r input tuples. In explicit terms, for r in the natural numbers, and f, g of type cal conf.multi input r, its defining expression is for every i : Fin r, Cal Conf.Same Boundary Value F i G i.
correspondence.leanType: def SameBoundaryValues {r : ℕ} (F G : CalConf.MultiInput r) : Prop

correspondence.mathematicalMeaning: Weighted pointwise boundary equivalence for rank-r input tuples. In explicit terms, for r in the natural numbers, w of type fin r maps to the real numbers, and f, g of type cal conf.multi input r, its defining expression is for every i : Fin r, Cal Conf.Same Boundary Value At Weight w i F i G i.
correspondence.leanType: def SameBoundaryValueAtWeights {r : ℕ} (w : Fin r → ℝ) (F G : CalConf.MultiInput r) : Prop

correspondence.mathematicalMeaning: For r in the natural numbers, and F of type Cal Conf.Multi Input r, Cal Conf.Same Boundary Values F F.
correspondence.leanType: theorem SameBoundaryValues_refl {r : ℕ} (F : CalConf.MultiInput r) : CalConf.SameBoundaryValues F F

correspondence.mathematicalMeaning: For r in the natural numbers, F, G of type Cal Conf.Multi Input r, and hFG of type Cal Conf.Same Boundary Values F G, Cal Conf.Same Boundary Values G F.
correspondence.leanType: theorem SameBoundaryValues_symm {r : ℕ} {F G : CalConf.MultiInput r} (hFG : CalConf.SameBoundaryValues F G) : CalConf.SameBoundaryValues G F

correspondence.mathematicalMeaning: For r in the natural numbers, F, G, K of type Cal Conf.Multi Input r, hFG of type Cal Conf.Same Boundary Values F G, and hGK of type Cal Conf.Same Boundary Values G K, Cal Conf.Same Boundary Values F K.
correspondence.mathematicalFormula: \forall\,r\colon \mathbb{N},\;F,G,K\colon \operatorname{CalConf}.\operatorname{MultiInput} r,\;hFG\colon \operatorname{CalConf}.\operatorname{SameBoundaryValues} F G,\;hGK\colon \operatorname{CalConf}.\operatorname{SameBoundaryValues} G K,\quad \operatorname{CalConf}.\operatorname{SameBoundaryValues} F K
correspondence.leanType: theorem SameBoundaryValues_trans {r : ℕ} {F G K : CalConf.MultiInput r} (hFG : CalConf.SameBoundaryValues F G) (hGK : CalConf.SameBoundaryValues G K) : CalConf.SameBoundaryValues F K

correspondence.mathematicalMeaning: For r in the natural numbers, w of type Fin r maps to the real numbers, F, G of type Cal Conf.Multi Input r, and hFG of type Cal Conf.Same Boundary Value At Weights w F G, Cal Conf.Same Boundary Values F G.
correspondence.mathematicalFormula: \forall\,r\colon \mathbb{N},\;w\colon \operatorname{Fin} r \longrightarrow \mathbb{R},\;F,G\colon \operatorname{CalConf}.\operatorname{MultiInput} r,\;hFG\colon \operatorname{CalConf}.\operatorname{SameBoundaryValueAtWeights} w F G,\quad \operatorname{CalConf}.\operatorname{SameBoundaryValues} F G
correspondence.leanType: theorem SameBoundaryValueAtWeights.sameBoundaryValues {r : ℕ} {w : Fin r → ℝ} {F G : CalConf.MultiInput r} (hFG : CalConf.SameBoundaryValueAtWeights w F G) : CalConf.SameBoundaryValues F G

references.note: Source for multilinear tangentiality and Laplacian-word constructions.

limitations: The displayed Lean results are checked relative to structures, typeclasses, certificates, or model laws supplied as hypotheses. The module does not by itself derive every interface field from a concrete geometric backend.
